title: [AMDGPU] Detect trivially uniform arguments in InstCombine

tests.test_body:
; Function Attrs: convergent nocallback nofree nounwind willreturn memory(none)
declare i64 @llvm.amdgcn.fcmp.i64.f32(float, float, i32 immarg) #0

define i64 @fcmp_constant_inputs_false() {
; CHECK-LABEL: @fcmp_constant_inputs_false(
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i64 0
  %result = call i64 @llvm.amdgcn.fcmp.i64.f32(float 2.000000e+00, float 4.000000e+00, i32 1)
  ret i64 %result
}

; Function Attrs: convergent nocallback nofree nounwind willreturn memory(none)
declare i64 @llvm.amdgcn.fcmp.i64.f32(float, float, i32 immarg) #0

define i64 @fcmp_constant_inputs_true() {
; CHECK-LABEL: @fcmp_constant_inputs_true(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[RESULT:%.*]] = call i64 @llvm.read_register.i64(metadata [[META0]]) #[[ATTR20]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i64 [[RESULT]]
  %result = call i64 @llvm.amdgcn.fcmp.i64.f32(float 2.000000e+00, float 4.000000e+00, i32 4)
  ret i64 %result
}

; Function Attrs: convergent nocallback nofree nounwind willreturn memory(none)
declare i64 @llvm.amdgcn.icmp.i64.i32(i32, i32, i32 immarg) #0

define i64 @icmp_constant_inputs_false() {
; CHECK-LABEL: @icmp_constant_inputs_false(
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i64 0
  %result = call i64 @llvm.amdgcn.icmp.i64.i32(i32 9, i32 8, i32 32)
  ret i64 %result
}

; Function Attrs: convergent nocallback nofree nounwind willreturn memory(none)
declare i64 @llvm.amdgcn.icmp.i64.i32(i32, i32, i32 immarg) #0

define i64 @icmp_constant_inputs_true() {
; CHECK-LABEL: @icmp_constant_inputs_true(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[RESULT:%.*]] = call i64 @llvm.read_register.i64(metadata [[META0:![0-9]+]]) #[[ATTR20:[0-9]+]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i64 [[RESULT]]
  %result = call i64 @llvm.amdgcn.icmp.i64.i32(i32 9, i32 8, i32 34)
  ret i64 %result
}

define amdgpu_kernel void @permlane64_uniform(ptr addrspace(1) %out, i32 %src) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @permlane64_uniform(
; CHECK-NEXT:    store i32 [[SRC1:%.*]], ptr addrspace(1) [[OUT:%.*]], align 4
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret void
  %res = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.permlane64(i32 %src)
  store i32 %res, ptr addrspace(1) %out, align 4
  ret void
}

declare i32 @llvm.amdgcn.permlanex16.i32(i32, i32, i32, i32, i1 immarg, i1 immarg)

define amdgpu_kernel void @permlanex16_fetch_invalid_bound_ctrl(ptr addrspace(1) %out, i32 %src0, i32 %src1, i32 %src2) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @permlanex16_fetch_invalid_bound_ctrl(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[RES:%.*]] = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.permlanex16.i32(i32 undef, i32 [[SRC0:%.*]], i32 [[SRC1:%.*]], i32 [[SRC2:%.*]], i1 true, i1 true)
; CHECK-NEXT:    store i32 [[RES]], ptr addrspace(1) [[OUT:%.*]], align 4
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret void
  %res = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.permlanex16.i32(i32 12345, i32 %src0, i32 %src1, i32 %src2, i1 true, i1 true)
  store i32 %res, ptr addrspace(1) %out, align 4
  ret void
}

declare i32 @llvm.amdgcn.prng.b32(i32)

define i32 @prng_poison_i32() {
; CHECK-LABEL: @prng_poison_i32(
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 poison
  %prng = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.prng.b32(i32 poison)
  ret i32 %prng
}

declare i32 @llvm.amdgcn.prng.b32(i32)

define i32 @prng_undef_i32() {
; CHECK-LABEL: @prng_undef_i32(
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 undef
  %prng = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.prng.b32(i32 undef)
  ret i32 %prng
}

@gv = external constant i32

; Function Attrs: convergent nocallback nofree nounwind willreturn memory(none)
declare i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readfirstlane(i32) #0

define amdgpu_cs void @readfirstlane_constant(i32 %arg, ptr %ptr) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @readfirstlane_constant(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[VAR:%.*]] = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readfirstlane.i32(i32 [[ARG:%.*]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    store volatile i32 [[VAR]], ptr [[PTR:%.*]], align 4
; CHECK-NEXT:    store volatile i32 0, ptr [[PTR]], align 4
; CHECK-NEXT:    store volatile i32 123, ptr [[PTR]], align 4
; CHECK-NEXT:    store volatile i32 ptrtoint (ptr @gv to i32), ptr [[PTR]], align 4
; CHECK-NEXT:    store volatile i32 undef, ptr [[PTR]], align 4
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret void
  %var = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readfirstlane(i32 %arg)
  %zero = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readfirstlane(i32 0)
  %imm = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readfirstlane(i32 123)
  %constexpr = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readfirstlane(i32 ptrtoint (ptr @gv to i32))
  %undef = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readfirstlane(i32 undef)
  store volatile i32 %var, ptr %ptr, align 4
  store volatile i32 %zero, ptr %ptr, align 4
  store volatile i32 %imm, ptr %ptr, align 4
  store volatile i32 %constexpr, ptr %ptr, align 4
  store volatile i32 %undef, ptr %ptr, align 4
  ret void
}
tests.source_program:
@gv = external constant i32

; Function Attrs: convergent nocallback nofree nounwind willreturn memory(none)
declare i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readfirstlane(i32) #0

define amdgpu_cs void @readfirstlane_constant(i32 %arg, ptr %ptr) {
  %var = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readfirstlane(i32 %arg)
  %zero = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readfirstlane(i32 0)
  %imm = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readfirstlane(i32 123)
  %constexpr = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readfirstlane(i32 ptrtoint (ptr @gv to i32))
  %undef = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readfirstlane(i32 undef)
  store volatile i32 %var, ptr %ptr, align 4
  store volatile i32 %zero, ptr %ptr, align 4
  store volatile i32 %imm, ptr %ptr, align 4
  store volatile i32 %constexpr, ptr %ptr, align 4
  store volatile i32 %undef, ptr %ptr, align 4
  ret void
}

tests.test_body:
@gv = external constant i32

; Function Attrs: convergent nocallback nofree nounwind willreturn memory(none)
declare i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readlane(i32, i32) #0

define amdgpu_cs void @readlane_constant(i32 %arg, i32 %lane, ptr %ptr) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @readlane_constant(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[VAR:%.*]] = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readlane.i32(i32 [[ARG:%.*]], i32 7)
; CHECK-NEXT:    store volatile i32 [[VAR]], ptr [[PTR:%.*]], align 4
; CHECK-NEXT:    store volatile i32 0, ptr [[PTR]], align 4
; CHECK-NEXT:    store volatile i32 123, ptr [[PTR]], align 4
; CHECK-NEXT:    store volatile i32 ptrtoint (ptr @gv to i32), ptr [[PTR]], align 4
; CHECK-NEXT:    store volatile i32 undef, ptr [[PTR]], align 4
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret void
  %var = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readlane(i32 %arg, i32 7)
  %zero = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readlane(i32 0, i32 %lane)
  %imm = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readlane(i32 123, i32 %lane)
  %constexpr = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readlane(i32 ptrtoint (ptr @gv to i32), i32 %lane)
  %undef = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readlane(i32 undef, i32 %lane)
  store volatile i32 %var, ptr %ptr, align 4
  store volatile i32 %zero, ptr %ptr, align 4
  store volatile i32 %imm, ptr %ptr, align 4
  store volatile i32 %constexpr, ptr %ptr, align 4
  store volatile i32 %undef, ptr %ptr, align 4
  ret void
}
tests.source_program:
@gv = external constant i32

; Function Attrs: convergent nocallback nofree nounwind willreturn memory(none)
declare i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readlane(i32, i32) #0

define amdgpu_cs void @readlane_constant(i32 %arg, i32 %lane, ptr %ptr) {
  %var = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readlane(i32 %arg, i32 7)
  %zero = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readlane(i32 0, i32 %lane)
  %imm = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readlane(i32 123, i32 %lane)
  %constexpr = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readlane(i32 ptrtoint (ptr @gv to i32), i32 %lane)
  %undef = call i32 @llvm.amdgcn.readlane(i32 undef, i32 %lane)
  store volatile i32 %var, ptr %ptr, align 4
  store volatile i32 %zero, ptr %ptr, align 4
  store volatile i32 %imm, ptr %ptr, align 4
  store volatile i32 %constexpr, ptr %ptr, align 4
  store volatile i32 %undef, ptr %ptr, align 4
  ret void
}
